change_summary: Seed current live Strategy.sol into a fresh v4 retained lane.
description: Fresh seed of the live screen-stage incumbent for apr02 screen breakout.
label: baseline

change_summary: Gate the stale-side tilt on latent-gap or event danger instead of charging +1 bps unconditionally.
decision_summary: delta 0.637952 did not clear promotion margin 18.836232
description: Replace the always-on stale-side tilt with a danger-gated directional overlay keyed to latent divergence and event danger.
label: danger-gated-tilt

change_summary: Raise the tilt activation thresholds so calm states avoid the stale-side surcharge more often.
decision_summary: delta 0.514821 did not clear promotion margin 18.883911
description: Make stale-side directional tilt more selective, activating only under clearer latent/event danger or residual cooldown.
label: danger-gated-tilt-v2

change_summary: Lower calm base fee to 63 bps and add latent-gap gated passive-side quiet-memory recapture.
decision_summary: delta 2.039121 did not clear promotion margin 18.711159
description: Port the worker-proven V8 quiet idle recapture candidate into the coordinated lane.
label: quiet-idle-recapture-v8

change_summary: Lower the quiet-idle family base fee from 63 to 62 bps.
decision_summary: delta 2.642547 did not clear promotion margin 18.706342
description: Reduce the quiet-idle family calm base fee to 62 bps while keeping the V8 quiet-memory rebate structure.
label: quiet-idle-recapture-v9

change_summary: Lower the quiet-idle family base fee from 62 to 61 bps.
decision_summary: delta 3.237985 did not clear promotion margin 18.700622
description: Reduce the quiet-idle family calm base fee to 61 bps while keeping the V8 quiet-memory rebate structure.
label: quiet-idle-recapture-v10

change_summary: Add a latent-gap and event-driven active-side arb overlay on top of the 61 bps quiet-idle surface.
decision_summary: delta -10.453716 did not clear promotion margin 18.897163
description: Pivot from the quiet-idle line by adding selective latent-gap arb protection and trimming quiet recapture when divergence is no longer fully calm.
label: arb-aware-quiet-idle-v1

change_summary: Raise arb-overlay thresholds and reduce coefficients; restore full quiet recapture when the regime remains calm.
decision_summary: delta -2.653805 did not clear promotion margin 18.770643
description: Narrow the arb-aware overlay so it activates only under clearer latent divergence and larger event danger.
label: arb-aware-quiet-idle-v2
